programmes.show_description: Anthems & cheesy tunes from the bars, clubs & pool parties of Mediterranean holidays gone by! Expect Whigfield, Ace Of Base & many more that you enjoyed in the sun!
There's nothing quite like a cheesy good party... Unless its a 90s cheesy party that is!! These are the greatest party anthems from the 90s. Fact!

programmes.show_name: You Know The Tune But Who Sang It?
programmes.show_description: All famous, sing-a-long hit songs but who the hell sang them? We guarantee you won't know most of these artists by name but you'll love their songs!

programmes.show_name: As Seen On TV with Robin Banks
programmes.show_description: Robin Banks' chart with big TV connections - could be theme tunes, Comic Relief, adverts or just a song made famous by a TV show. Our top 25 chart is Absolutely Fabulous!
